# mapbox Provider

The Mapbox provider allows you to manage Mapbox resources such as access tokens and styles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "mapbox" {
  access_token = var.mapbox_access_token # Or set MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN env var
  username     = var.mapbox_username     # Or set MAPBOX_USERNAME env var
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) Mapbox secret access token used for API authentication. Must have the appropriate scopes for the resources being managed. Can also be set with the `MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `username` (String) Mapbox account username. Can also be set with the `MAPBOX_USERNAME` environment variable.
